title: davallia divaricata var. orientalis
intro: Davallia divaricata var. orientalis, also known as the Oriental Lady fern, is a type of fern native to Asia that belongs to the Davallia genus of flowering plants. This plant has been traditionally used in various medicinal preparations, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, due to its reported anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits associated with Davallia divaricata var. orientalis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Davallia divaricata var. orientalis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal purposes, but its use should be carefully researched and guided by a healthcare professional.
